name: S C I
description_short: S.C.I. Federal Credit Union is an NCUA-insured credit union serving WestRock employees, retirees, and their families in Florence, South Carolina with competitive loan rates and digital banking services.
description_long:
S.C.I. Federal Credit Union is a member-owned, not-for-profit credit union regulated by the National Credit Union Administration (NCUA). Founded to serve the financial needs of WestRock employees and their families in Florence, South Carolina, the institution operates with a clear membership eligibility criterion tied to employment status. Like all federal credit unions, SCI FCU maintains NCUA insurance backing member savings up to at least $250,000, providing the same safety protections as FDIC-insured banks.

The credit union offers a comprehensive suite of financial products and services including vehicle loans (new and used), personal loans, share accounts (savings), share certificates, and digital banking solutions. Members can access accounts 24/7 through NetTeller online banking, a mobile app available for iPhone and Android devices, and PhoneTeller telephone banking. The institution provides ATM access through the AllPoint surcharge-free network and operates its own drive-through ATM available to members with SCI FCU VISA debit cards. Loan rates are prominently featured on their rates page, though specific APRs vary based on creditworthiness and vehicle age.

What distinguishes S.C.I. FCU is its tight community focus—membership is limited to WestRock employees, retirees, and immediate family members, creating a member-centric institution without the broader customer base of large national banks. The credit union has invested in modern digital infrastructure including a mobile app and 24/7 online account access, bridging traditional credit union operations with contemporary banking technology. Their recent addition of a drive-through ATM on Second Loop Road demonstrates commitment to member convenience.

S.C.I. FCU is a legitimate credit union with standard NCUA protections and reasonable member services, but potential joiners must meet the specific WestRock employment requirement. The website lacks published fee schedules and detailed rate information (rates are referenced but behind a separate page), making it necessary to contact the institution directly for pricing transparency. As a single-location credit union in Florence, SC, members may experience limited physical branch infrastructure compared to larger regional credit unions.
services: Vehicle loans (new and used) with rates based on creditworthiness and vehicle age
Personal loans and other installment credit products
Share accounts (savings accounts) with NCUA insurance
NetTeller 24/7 online banking with account inquiry, history viewing, and transfers
Online loan payment processing through NetTeller
E-Statements available for download and printing
Mobile banking app (SCI FCU Mobile) for iOS and Android devices
VISA debit/ATM cards with 24/7 drive-through ATM access
Surcharge-free ATM access via AllPoint Network
Card Manager for lost or stolen card reporting
pros: NCUA-insured savings up to $250,000 with full faith and credit of U.S. Government backing
24/7 online account access through NetTeller for inquiries, transfers, and loan payments
Mobile app (SCI FCU Mobile) for iPhone and Android provides convenient remote banking
Surcharge-free ATM access through AllPoint Network plus dedicated drive-through ATM
Competitive vehicle loan rates (new and used) advertised as fantastic rates
Multiple contact channels including toll-free lost card hotline (1-800-554-8969 and 1-800-847-2911)
E-statements available online to eliminate paper statement storage
PhoneTeller telephone banking service for Florence calling area (833-950-0460)
cons: Membership restricted to WestRock employees, retirees, and immediate family only—no open enrollment
Detailed fee schedule and specific APR rates not displayed on main website; requires direct contact for pricing
Single physical location in Florence, SC limits branch access for members outside the area
Limited information about loan products beyond vehicle and generic other loans
Drive-through hours reduced to 5:00 PM closing on Fridays (no weekend hours mentioned)
best_for: WestRock employees and retirees in Florence, South Carolina seeking member-owned credit union benefits
Immediate family members of WestRock staff wanting competitive vehicle financing and online banking
Members prioritizing federal insurance protections and NCUA regulation over large national bank options
diagnosis: S.C.I. Federal Credit Union is appropriate exclusively for WestRock employees, retirees, and their immediate family members seeking a federally-insured credit union with digital-first banking capabilities and competitive loan rates. The primary caveat is membership eligibility—without WestRock employment status, individuals cannot join, making this institution unavailable to the general public regardless of its services or rates.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
